name: ASUS ROG STRIX B860-I GAMING WIFI Intel B860 LGA 1851 Mini-iTX motherboard,DDR5 slots, two M.2 slots,one Thunderbolt 4 port , one USB 20Gbps Type-C connector  , ASUS AI Advisor, AI Networking II
